name: Gold Rush Lakewood Cash for Gold, Cash for Silver, Cash for Diamonds
description_short: Gold Rush buys precious metals and diamonds for cash across Colorado locations. They offer on-site expert evaluation, same-day payouts, and use XRF technology for accurate metal assessment.
description_long:
Gold Rush is a precious metals and diamond buyer operating multiple locations across Colorado, including Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Boulder County, and surrounding areas. The company specializes in converting unwanted or broken jewelry, coins, bullion, and other precious metal items into immediate cash compensation. Their business model centers on walk-in evaluations and same-day transactions, positioning themselves as a convenient alternative to traditional jewelry resale or appraisal services.

Gold Rush's primary service is purchasing gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, and related items from consumers. They accept jewelry in any condition—old, broken, damaged, or new—as well as coins, bullion, flatware, dental gold, rounds, and collectible silver items like tea sets and candlesticks. The company emphasizes a three-step process: bring items in, receive a free evaluation, and get paid in cash. They claim to complete most transactions in under 30 minutes and market themselves as offering "the highest payouts" with transparent, on-site evaluation performed in front of customers using industry-standard multi-step assessment methods and cutting-edge XRF x-ray technology.

The company differentiates itself through several operational claims: use of XRF technology for accurate precious metal content assessment in unusual forms, on-site expert evaluation with no pressure or obligation, transparent pricing with items never leaving the customer's sight, commitment to top-rated customer service (referencing Google reviews), and multiple convenient Colorado locations. They emphasize a relaxing, easy atmosphere and COVID-19 safety protocols to enhance customer comfort.

A key limitation is that the website makes broad claims about "highest payouts" without providing specific pricing, rates, or comparison data. No information is provided about how prices are determined, whether they vary by location or time, or how their rates compare to competitors. The company provides no details on fees, minimum purchase amounts, or what happens with items they decline. While their use of XRF technology is noted as an advantage, there's no transparency about their valuation methodology or whether customers receive written appraisals.
address: 650 S Wadsworth Blvd G, Lakewood, CO 80226

company_info.headquarters: 650 S Wadsworth Blvd G, Lakewood, CO 80226

pros: Uses XRF x-ray technology for accurate precious metal purity assessment in unusual or uncommon item forms
Offers free, no-obligation evaluations performed transparently in front of customers
Provides same-day cash payouts, typically completing transactions in under 30 minutes
Accepts wide variety of precious metal and diamond items including broken, damaged, or unusual forms
Multiple Colorado locations for convenience (9+ locations across metro Denver and Colorado Springs areas)
Emphasizes transparent process with items never leaving customer's sight during evaluation
References top-rated Google reviews and customer service commitment
cons: Makes unsubstantiated claims about having 'the highest payouts' without providing pricing transparency or competitor comparison data
No pricing information, rate sheets, or methodology disclosed on website for determining offer amounts
No information about acceptance criteria, minimum amounts, or whether items can be declined and returned
Does not disclose fees, processing costs, or any deductions that might apply to final payout
No details provided on appraisal process documentation or whether written evaluations are provided to customers
best_for: Consumers seeking immediate cash for unwanted, broken, or damaged jewelry and precious metal items without the wait of traditional resale channels
People with dental gold, bullion, or collectible silver items seeking quick local liquidation without shipping or online sales hassles
Those in Colorado metro areas needing convenient walk-in precious metal evaluation and instant compensation
diagnosis: Gold Rush is best for Colorado residents seeking quick cash conversion of unwanted precious metals and diamonds through convenient walk-in service. Primary caveat: the company makes broad claims about competitive pricing ('highest payouts') without publishing actual rates, making it impossible to verify whether their offers are genuinely competitive—consumers should compare quotes across multiple buyers before accepting any offer.
services: Silver jewelry, bullion, coins, and flatware buying
Silver bullion, rounds, coins, and collectible items (tea sets, candlesticks, flatware) buying
On-site XRF x-ray metal purity assessment
Same-day cash payouts for accepted items
Multi-location in-person evaluation services across Colorado
Transparent evaluation process with customer observation
